violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Green shelves under the small chicken cooler and by the electrical room need to be cleaned. Handle on the glass doors to the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The walk behind the dough prep station needs to be cleaned. Floor in the walk in freezer and cooler needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
